route.name: Dollarhide Summit Overnighter
route.description: Public GPX Idaho overnighter with mountain gravel, summit climbing, forest camps, and resort-town logistics.
route.surfaceMix: Public GPX Idaho overnighter with mountain gravel, summit climbing, forest camps, and resort-town logistics.
route.bestSeason: Late June and July are favorable if snow is gone and fire/smoke are quiet.

difficultyProfile.surface: Public GPX Idaho overnighter with mountain gravel, summit climbing, forest camps, and resort-town logistics.
difficultyProfile.traffic: review paved connectors and trailhead access
difficultyProfile.technical: moderate unless source notes say otherwise

resources.water: Creeks cover much of the route, but water is thinner south of Worswick; filter all sources.
resources.food: Ketchum and Hailey provide start/finish resupply and bike services.
resources.camping: Free unserviced NF sites near Frenchman's Bend and Worswick are key options; verify current rules.
resources.toiletsShowers: Use mapped waypoints and land-manager pages; confirm current operation before departure.
resources.bikeShops: Identify nearest shops and exact hours during final trip refresh.
resources.longestGap: Measure from imported GPX and source POIs before ride-ready promotion.
resources.mosquitoes: Seasonal; check recent reports for camp and water-adjacent sections.

tips: Excellent July candidate after snow/fire check.

verification.notes: Public GPX imported and parsed locally. Final legal/resource checks still control ride-ready promotion.

mapQuality.reviewRule: Route line is imported from public GPX and suitable for planning review.

review.decision: reject/rework for ride_ready; exact legal camp and Sawtooth NF order overlay are not proven
blockers: Not ride-ready until date-specific camp/permit, water, legal access, closures, fire/smoke, and weather are refreshed.
No exact legal campsite or lodging proof for July 10-13.
No official GPX overlay against Sawtooth NF forest orders, road/trail restrictions, and private-ranch-adjacent sections.
Weather forecast and smoke/AQI cannot be finalized this far out.
requiredFixes: Complete July 9-10 final refresh for next-weekend ride readiness.
Select exact camp coordinates and prove dispersed legality from official Sawtooth NF/MVUM/forest-order source, or reserve/confirm lodging.
Overlay GPX against current Sawtooth NF alerts/orders and confirm roads are bicycle-legal/open.
Measure water gaps and mark reliable July sources.
Refresh NWS forecast, fire restrictions, active fires, and AirNow/NOAA smoke 24-48h before departure.
openQuestions: Do current closures/fire/weather alter the imported GPX?
